scenario: A corporation records a payment to a shareholder as a shareholder loan repayment, and the supporting evidentiary route is complete.

cdm_classification.reason: The claimed label is supported by opening balance continuity, ledger evidence, corporate authorization, and bank transaction records.

permitted_ai_response.system_response: The route has reached structural closure. AI-assisted legal-tax text may be generated, subject to professional review and jurisdiction-specific confirmation.
permitted_ai_response.permitted_response_type: Generate a cautious tax analysis explaining why the shareholder loan repayment classification is supported by the admitted evidence.
